text:
Once installed on a laptop Toshiba L30 additional memory kinston pc2-6400 CL5 200-Pin SODIMM/1G not working xorg: Setting vga for screen 0.
(II) RADEON (0): TOTO SAYS 0000000000000000
(EE) RADEON (0): No valid MMIO address
(II) UnloadModule: "radeon"
(EE) Screen (s) found, but none have a usable configuration.
On release FreeBSD-7.1 works

Fix: 

no
How-To-Repeat: startx
